name: Echo Chamber
description: Simulates a live streaming-style chat reacting to your roleplay in real time. Add the Agent in Chat Settings → Agents → Misc Agents for Roleplay mode.

defaultSettings.defaultPromptTemplateDescription: Chaotic livestream chat with mixed hype, jokes, analysis, shipping, and callbacks.

promptTemplates.name: AO3 / Wattpad
promptTemplates.description: Fanfic comment-section energy: shipping, kudos, screaming, favorite lines, and reader speculation.

promptTemplates.name: Twitter / Reddit
promptTemplates.description: A mix of quote-tweet reactions, thread jokes, hot takes, and subreddit analysis.

promptTemplates.name: 4chan
promptTemplates.description: Anonymous imageboard chaos with greentext cadence, bait, and blunt reactions.

promptTemplates.name: Constructive
promptTemplates.description: Thoughtful reactions that point out strengths, pacing, continuity, and possible next beats.

promptTemplates.name: Hype Squad
promptTemplates.description: Maximum cheering, caps, celebration, cheering-on, and dramatic overreaction.

promptTemplates.name: Harbingers
promptTemplates.description: Fatui Harbingers and agents reacting from the peanut gallery.

author: Pasta Devs
